title: Effects of Congestive Heart Failure
text_en: If you have heart failure, your heart has lost the ability to pump enough blood to meet

title: Effects of Congestive Heart Failure
text_en: your body's needs.

title: Effects of Congestive Heart Failure
text_en: You may have weak or damaged ventricular walls that are not able to push enough blood

title: Effects of Congestive Heart Failure
text_en: out of your heart.

title: Effects of Congestive Heart Failure
text_en: You may also have stiff and thickened ventricular walls that do not allow your heart to fill

title: Effects of Congestive Heart Failure
text_en: with enough blood.

title: Effects of Congestive Heart Failure
text_en: If you have left-sided heart failure, your left ventricle does not deliver enough oxygen

title: Effects of Congestive Heart Failure
text_en: rich blood to your body, making you feel tired and out of breath.

title: Effects of Congestive Heart Failure
text_en: Your failing left ventricle also increases the blood pressure in the blood vessels between

title: Effects of Congestive Heart Failure
text_en: your lungs and left ventricle.

title: Effects of Congestive Heart Failure
text_en: This increased pressure forces fluid out of your blood and into your lung tissues, which

title: Effects of Congestive Heart Failure
text_en: makes it difficult for you to breathe.

title: Effects of Congestive Heart Failure
text_en: If you have right-sided heart failure, your right ventricle is unable to contract with

title: Effects of Congestive Heart Failure
text_en: enough force to push blood to your lungs.

title: Effects of Congestive Heart Failure
text_en: The result is a build-up of blood in your veins, which causes a build-up of fluid called

title: Effects of Congestive Heart Failure
text_en: edema throughout the tissues in your body.

title: Effects of Congestive Heart Failure
text_en: Over time, heart failure on either side of your heart results in weakened and large

title: Effects of Congestive Heart Failure
text_en: ventricles that deliver less blood to your body.

title: Effects of Congestive Heart Failure
text_en: To make up for the decreased amount of blood, your nervous system releases stress hormones

title: Effects of Congestive Heart Failure
text_en: that increase the speed and force of your heart beat.

title: Effects of Congestive Heart Failure
text_en: Unfortunately, the continued release of these stress hormones makes your heart fail

title: Effects of Congestive Heart Failure
text_en: your worse because they damage the muscle cells in your ventricles.

title: Heart Failure Treatment  Lifestyle Changes
text_en: This video will help you understand some lifestyle changes you can make to treat heart failure.

title: Heart Failure Treatment  Lifestyle Changes
text_en: Please watch the entire video to learn about lifestyle changes for heart failure.

title: Heart Failure Treatment  Lifestyle Changes
text_en: As a heart failure patient, you may need to make some lifestyle changes to prevent further damage to your heart.

title: Heart Failure Treatment  Lifestyle Changes
text_en: If you smoke, quitting is one of the most important things you can do for your heart.

title: Heart Failure Treatment  Lifestyle Changes
text_en: Work with your healthcare provider to create a nutritious eating plan that also helps you maintain a healthy weight.

title: Heart Failure Treatment  Lifestyle Changes
text_en: A heart healthy diet includes vegetables, fruits, lean meats and whole grains, as well as low fat or fat-free dairy products.

title: Heart Failure Treatment  Lifestyle Changes
text_en: High calorie foods such as cookies and soda should be replaced with fruits and vegetables that don't contain added salt and sugar.

title: Heart Failure Treatment  Lifestyle Changes
text_en: Examples of foods in a healthy diet include vegetables such as carrots, broccoli and tomatoes, fruits such as apples, oranges and strawberries,

title: Heart Failure Treatment  Lifestyle Changes
text_en: lean proteins such as fish, chicken and beans,

title: Heart Failure Treatment  Lifestyle Changes
text_en: dairy foods such as low fat yogurt and cheese,

title: Heart Failure Treatment  Lifestyle Changes
text_en: starches such as whole wheat bread and sweet potatoes,

title: Heart Failure Treatment  Lifestyle Changes
text_en: and healthy drinks such as water and fat-free milk.

title: Heart Failure Treatment  Lifestyle Changes
text_en: Reduce the amount of salt and sugar you eat.

title: Heart Failure Treatment  Lifestyle Changes
text_en: Keep sodium levels below 2000mg to reduce the amount of water retained by your body.

title: Heart Failure Treatment  Lifestyle Changes
text_en: Substitute solid fats with heart healthy oils such as olive oil.

title: Heart Failure Treatment  Lifestyle Changes
text_en: Limit the amount of fluid you drink.

title: Heart Failure Treatment  Lifestyle Changes
text_en: Ask your healthcare provider how much fluid you should drink each day.

title: Heart Failure Treatment  Lifestyle Changes
text_en: And remember, a heart healthy diet doesn't include alcohol.

title: Heart Failure Treatment  Lifestyle Changes
text_en: Also, check with your healthcare provider about an exercise plan that's right for you.

title: Heart Failure Treatment  Lifestyle Changes
text_en: 30 minutes of daily low impact exercise can help strengthen your heart.

title: Heart Failure Treatment  Lifestyle Changes
text_en: Talk to your healthcare provider if you have any questions about lifestyle changes to help you manage heart failure.

title: Heart Failure Treatment  Medication
text_en: Your doctor may prescribe one or more types of medication to treat your heart failure.

title: Heart Failure Treatment  Medication
text_en: Diuretic medications reduce the swelling in your body by increasing the amount of urine produced by your kidneys.

title: Heart Failure Treatment  Medication
text_en: Ace inhibitors are medications that allow your blood vessels to expand.

title: Heart Failure Treatment  Medication
text_en: This helps decrease your blood pressure and prevents further damage to your heart by making it easier for your heart to pump blood.

title: Heart Failure Treatment  Medication
text_en: Beta blockers are medications that block the effects of stress hormones on your heart.

title: Heart Failure Treatment  Medication
text_en: Although beta blockers slow down your heartbeat, they are mainly used to protect your heart muscle from the long-term damage caused by stress hormones.
